flags.message: This is a Reconstruction-era mandatory-jurisdiction cause (The Alicia, 7 Wall. 571 (1869)), not a cert petition, so the petition-disposition frame does not really apply. It appears to have stayed in predict scope because the snapshot has no dates or docket number for the era-based exclusion predicates to latch onto.

The snapshot is nearly bare: no docket entries, dates, docket number, or parties; the only substantive signal is the case name and one linked opinion cluster. The disposition looks recoverable from that cluster (a probe-recoverability candidate), which would let this event be resolved or excluded instead of predicted from a one-line record.
